HediffDef.label: empowered spell
HediffDef.description: You pour raw force into your magic - it hits noticeably harder.

HediffDef.label: careful spell
HediffDef.description: You shape your magic so it never turns on you - and the backlash of battle bothers you less.

HediffDef.label: subtle spell
HediffDef.description: You cast without obvious tell - composed under pressure and more persuasive.

HediffDef.label: quickened spell
HediffDef.description: Your spells return to readiness markedly faster.

HediffDef.label: twinned spell
HediffDef.description: Your single-target spells split to strike a second nearby foe.

HediffDef.label: agonizing blast
HediffDef.description: Your eldritch power lands with cruel force - your spells hit harder.

HediffDef.label: devil's sight
HediffDef.description: Darkness is no veil to you - your aim never falters for want of light.

HediffDef.label: armor of shadows
HediffDef.description: Wreathed in protective gloom - a standing ward against harm.

HediffDef.label: fiendish resilience
HediffDef.description: Your patron's vitality flows in you - harder to hurt and harder to drop.

HediffDef.label: beguiling influence
HediffDef.description: Honeyed, otherworldly charm - people bend to your words.

HediffDef.label: eldritch mind
HediffDef.description: Your mind is anchored against the things you have seen - very hard to break.
